caption: In a studio setting, a person's hands are seen handling a trading card protected in a plastic case and a matching blue and white box. In the initial scenes, the person holds up the encased card, showcasing it before the camera. As the sequence progresses, the hands move to interact with a rectangular box labeled "CLEARLY." The background features a white surface with various sports card boxes stacked behind. A small inset window shows a man wearing a black t-shirt and a black baseball cap watching the process. On-screen graphics include a red and orange logo that reads "JASPYS CASEBREAKS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.com." The scene transitions from a close-up focus on the individual trading card to the person sliding the card case back into the branded packaging, while the "JASPYS BREAKS" text remains prominent across the bottom of the frame.
